text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, should I go for this one? Or maybe this
one?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh, Sweep. Here for some reading?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Perfect timing, Rob Roy! Know any names of
some really yucky herbal plants?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yucky herbal plants? Why would you want to
know about something like that?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
N-no reason. I'm just curious... So do you know
any?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Hmm, well... I would say senburi is known to be particularly bitter.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Senburi, got it! That might just work. ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Um... Where are you going, Sweep?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Uhm, according to my grandma's ancient
encyclopedia of wild herbs and flowers... Senburi
grows in sunny places and has long, thin leaves...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Are you perhaps searching for senburi? But why?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you wanna know? Well, guess what? I'm
gonna pull a prank on Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
A prank?! I-I don't think that's a good idea! You
better stop!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No way! She deserves it! She made me eat veggies
the other day, so I'm gonna teach her a lesson!
Now that's an intriguing story. And just who will be taught this lesson, exactly?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That meanie dorm leader, duh! She's always bullying me and telling me what to do! Well, I'll show her!
Meanie dorm leader, you say? Interesting.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear. Oh dear, oh dear... Sweep, I think you
should stop no—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! ♪ Let's see how she likes this super bitter herbal drink. I can't wait to see how ugly the face she makes is!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Who knows... Perhaps she'll make a face... like
this?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, stop! That's so fun...ny...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Eeeeek! Why, just why?! What are you doing
here, Fuji?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What now... I know! You there! Give me some
kind of excuse!
choice_data_list:
You only had Fuji Kiseki's best intentions in
mind, right?!

You only had Fuji Kiseki's best intentions in
mind, right?!
You should be honest and apologize.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What now... I know! You there! Give me some
kind of excuse!
choice_data_list:
You only had Fuji Kiseki's best intentions in
mind, right?!

You only had Fuji Kiseki's best intentions in
mind, right?!
You should be honest and apologize.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, that's it! I was looking for medicinal
plants so you can stay healthy, Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So that was your intention. Herbal plants to keep
me in good health. Your kindness pleases me.
However...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It would be such a waste for me to enjoy this on
my own. Sweep, you should have some with me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If this herb will make you healthy, as you say,
then I wish for the both of us to be in good
health. How's that?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: W-well, uh... I haven't even found any ye—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Where art thou, senburi? Ah, doth mine
eyes deceive me? Yes, I do believe I've found
some.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No way, already?! Ew, ew, ewww! I'm not drinking
any!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, now now, let's have some fun, shall we? Perhaps we can have a little senburi-infused tea party.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Noooo! Why are you so into this anyway?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: If Sweep is a witch, then Fuji's a grand sorceress...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I shall give you a treat if you apologize
like a good little witch.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wait, really?! But... what kind of treat?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You'll find out after you apologize. Well, what do
you say?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Grrrr... fine. I just have to apologize, right? If
that's what you want.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That wasn't so bad, was it? I think this good little
witch deserves a treat. Could everyone come
along too?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I've got a nutrient-rich cake filled with lots of
sweet, fluffy cream! Go on, have a bite!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yaaaay, cake! Hehe, don't mind if I do! ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much for giving me a piece. How
intriguing. Tell me, how did you fit so many
nutrients in one serving—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oho, have you figured out the secret? Let's just...
keep this a secret from Sweep.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
So I was right... The main ingredient must be
vegetables. If Sweep is a witch, then Fuji must be
a grand sorceress...
